scripts.dev: npm run build -w @tapython-tool-hub/shared && npm run dev -w @tapython-tool-hub/web
scripts.dev:api: npm run build -w @tapython-tool-hub/shared && npm run dev -w @tapython-tool-hub/api
scripts.start:api: npm run build -w @tapython-tool-hub/shared && npm run build -w @tapython-tool-hub/api && npm run start -w @tapython-tool-hub/api
scripts.build: npm run generate:data && npm run build -w @tapython-tool-hub/web
scripts.build:api: npm run build -w @tapython-tool-hub/shared && npm run build -w @tapython-tool-hub/api
scripts.generate:data: npm run build -w @tapython-tool-hub/shared && npm run build -w @tapython-tool-hub/tooling && node scripts/generate-data.mjs
